questions.text: The SI unit of pressure is:
questions.explanation: Pressure is measured in Pascal (Pa). 1 Pa = 1 N/m²

questions.text: Bernoulli's principle is based on conservation of energy.
questions.explanation: Bernoulli's principle states that for streamline flow, the sum of pressure energy, kinetic energy, and potential energy per unit volume is constant.

questions.text: The viscosity of liquids ________ with increase in temperature.
questions.explanation: Viscosity of liquids decreases with temperature, while viscosity of gases increases with temperature.

questions.correctAnswer: Pascal's law states that pressure applied to an enclosed fluid is transmitted undiminished to every part of the fluid.
questions.explanation: Pascal's law is the principle behind hydraulic lift and hydraulic brakes.
